title: Yijing Hexagram 33: Dun (Retreat)
description: Hexagram 33 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 33 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Retreat. Success. In what is small, perseverance furthers. Mountain under heaven.
